ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry classification of the company */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* URL of the company's official website */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Latest market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the company's initial public offering */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "business_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company's business */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the organization */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Numerical representation of the user's access level */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock price record accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Parameters used in the query (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
